title: Special military aircraft from Middle East at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: A SPECIAL military aircraft from the Middle East has been spotted at Prestwick Airport ...

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Special military aircraft from Middle East at Prestwick Airport The United Arab Emirates Air Force C-17A Globemaster passed by our photographer (Image: Charlie Gilmour)

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald. A SPECIAL military aircraft from the Middle East has been spotted at Prestwick Airport.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Special military aircraft from Middle East spotted at Prestwick Airport
